status_gpu_stats: GPU: X% | VRAM: Y/Z MB | Temp: T°C
msg_loaded_params: ✓ Loaded parameters for PID {pid}: {count} external args
tooltip_context_size: Maximum context size for the model (read from GGUF file metadata)
tooltip_cache_type_k: Quantization type for Key cache in KV cache (f16 = standard precision, q4_0 saves VRAM at cost of quality)
tooltip_cache_type_v: Quantization type for Value cache in KV cache (f16 = standard precision, q4_0 saves VRAM at cost of quality)
tooltip_max_tokens: Number of tokens to generate in response (-1 for unlimited generation until completion)
tooltip_np: Number of parallel server slots for handling multiple requests (-1 for automatic calculation based on resources)
tooltip_threads: Number of CPU threads to use for text generation (more threads = faster processing)
tooltip_batch_size: Maximum batch size for processing input prompts (llama.cpp default: 2048)
tooltip_gpu_layers: Number of transformer layers to offload to GPU for faster inference
tooltip_temperature: Sampling temperature for text generation (lower values = more deterministic, higher values = more creative)
tooltip_top_p: Top-p (nucleus) sampling parameter (lower values = more focused output, higher values = more diverse)
tooltip_top_k: Maximum number of tokens for top-k sampling (0 = disabled, higher values = more diversity)
tooltip_min_p: Minimum token probability threshold (p-sampling) - tokens with p < min_p are removed (0.0 = disabled)
tooltip_repeat_penalty: Penalty for repeated tokens (higher values = avoid repetition, lower values = allow repetition)
tooltip_flash_attn: Enable Flash Attention optimization for faster attention computation (requires CUDA 12.0+ and compatible GPU)
tooltip_host: IP address and port for llama-server WebUI access (localhost = local machine only)
tooltip_slot_save_path: Directory path for saving and caching slot states between requests (RAM disk recommended for performance)
tooltip_benchmark_file: Reference file to include in benchmark context (will be read before question generation)
tooltip_parallel_slots: Number of parallel server slots for handling multiple concurrent requests (default: 1)
tooltip_all_layers: Load all GPU layers (as many as possible)
tooltip_load_process_args:
Load parameters from running llama-server into the app
Unmanaged parameters will be displayed separately
